legal_model.notes_normalized: Cannabis is illegal in Malawi / Malaŵi. Medical cannabis is legal. Distribution is illegal.

notes_normalized: Cannabis is illegal in Malawi / Malaŵi. Medical cannabis is legal. Distribution is illegal.
notes_raw: {{main|Cannabis in Malawi}} Illegal but widely used and cultivated; Malawian cannabis is famed internationally for its quality.<ref>{{cite news|url=https://news.bbc.co.uk/2/hi/africa/920052.stm |title=Malawi Rastas' marijuana struggle |publisher=[[BBC News]] |date=11 September 2000 |access-date=20 April 2011 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20180227110028/http://news.bbc.co.uk/2/hi/africa/920052.stm |archive-date=27 February 2018 |url-status=live}}</ref> Chamba is grown mainly in central and northern regions like [[Mzuzu]].<ref>{{cite news|url=https://www.nytimes.com/1998/12/17/world/marijuana-cultivation-increases-in-malawi.html |title=Marijuana Cultivation Increases in Malawi |work=[[The New York Times]] |agency=[[Agence France-Presse]] |date=17 December 1998 |access-date=20 April 2011 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20180615010423/https://www.nytimes.com/1998/12/17/world/marijuana-cultivation-increases-in-malawi.html |archive-date=15 June 2018 |url-status=live |url-access=limited}}</ref>

facts.cultivation: grown mainly in central and northern regions like Mzuzu .
